speakers.name: Ashok Vaswani
direct_answers: Jai Mundhra: Sure, sir. That helps a lot. Thank you and all the very best.
Suraj Das: Sure, sir. And sir, those 2 questions on the strategy on the consumer Bank and the PL on?
dodged_or_vague: Rikin Shah: Got it. Thank you, gentlemen, for answering all the questions.
speakers.summary: Ashok Vaswani, the Managing Director & CEO of Kotak Mahindra Bank, delivered a confident and comprehensive overview of the bank's performance and strategic direction. He highlighted the bank's focus on scaling responsibly, with net advances growing 16% year-on-year and a healthy NIM of 4.54%. Vaswani emphasized the bank's strategy to enhance customer engagement through targeted propositions like the Solitaire and 811 offerings. He acknowledged the volatile macroeconomic environment but remained optimistic about the Indian economy's resilience. Vaswani addressed questions directly, particularly on the bank's consumer strategy, while maintaining a positive outlook on future growth and profitability.

speakers.name: Devang Gheewalla
direct_answers: Abhishek Murarka: Exactly. So, that is where my question was from because cost-to-assets has come down in a period when some of your assets, which require more spend, they have not grown. And now when they grow, does cost-to-asset go back to 3% or from here you continue to see steady reduction in cost-to-assets? So, just that understanding, that's it.
Piran Engineer: Got it. And just on the LAP percentage of the mortgage book?
dodged_or_vague: Chintan: And just a request for the next quarter, just for a couple of quarters, if you could give us a yield on advances and cost of deposits, just as this repricing completes, I don't want to get into that granularity, but it will help for a few quarters. Thank you.
speakers.summary: Devang Gheewalla, the Group Chief Financial Officer, provided a detailed and neutral overview of Kotak Mahindra Bank's financial performance for Q3. He highlighted improvements in net interest income, fee income, and credit costs, alongside a 15% year-on-year growth in the bank's balance sheet. Gheewalla discussed the bank's cautious approach to unsecured retail loan growth and the focus on maintaining asset quality. He addressed questions directly, particularly on cost management and asset growth, while providing insights into the bank's strategic financial decisions. His tone remained neutral, focusing on factual financial data and performance metrics.

speakers.name: Moderator
speakers.summary: The Moderator facilitated the Kotak Mahindra Bank Q3 FY '26 Earnings Conference Call with a neutral tone, ensuring the smooth progression of the call. They provided instructions for participants, introduced the speakers, and managed the Q&A session. The Moderator concluded the call by thanking participants and signaling the end of the conference. Their role was primarily logistical, focusing on the efficient management of the call rather than contributing content.
